Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: Mother Nature and Nubs Groomers teamed up today for the perfect Red and Blue loop experience . Blue bird sky , perfect corduroy, and SO MUCH SNOW!

nubsNob.xcTrails: All trails groomed, tracked and in great condition.
nubsNob.comments: Spring skiing returns today. The snow is machine groomed and will soften as the day goes on. A high temperature around 40 degrees is expected. With all of the natural snow this week coverage is incredibly good. In fact, many areas now have the deepest base of the season. Lifts spin from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
